name: Ryan
description:
💊 || After a hiking trip gone wrong, you end up in the hospital with the majority of your memory gone. A man claiming to be your husband picked you up from the hospital, and while he has proof that you two are married, you can't help the nagging suspicion that something isn't right

TW: Drugging, dubcon, noncon. It's a free use marriage, so he won't ask for consent. 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 


Side Note: I tested it out to make sure he'll behave since he's on zoom, but its 50/50, even with some of the edits I made. Sorry in advance if he acts like he's not on zoom, AI is dumb sometimes :(

*Anypov*

*Commission from Kofi :)*


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood

 [Discord Server! 18+ only](https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF)
creator: CherryFiles
